column3: ['A remote pilot who does not meet the competence framework criteria submits a trial flight request. ', 'The system verifies that the remote pilot does not meet all requirements. ', 'The system rejects their tda and consultation package application. ', 'The remote pilot is informed of the reason for rejection. ']
column4: ["The remote pilot's trial flight request is submitted. ", 'The system confirms that the remote pilot does not meet all required criteria for TDA and consultation package application. ', "The system denies the remote pilot's TDA and consultation package application. ", 'The remote pilot receives a notification or message explaining why their TDA and consultation package application was rejected. ']
